name: onboarding-orchestrator
description: MCP specification for the bank onboarding orchestrator. Initiates the on-chain flow and triggers all parallel review sub-workflows.

tools.name: initiate_onboarding
tools.description: Initiate an institutional client onboarding flow. Registers the flow on-chain and opens AML, Credit Risk, and Legal review requests in parallel.

flow_id.description: Unique flow identifier (bytes32 hex, e.g. keccak256 of client+timestamp)

client_address.description: Ethereum address of the client institution initiating onboarding

bank_credit_agent_id.description: Bank credit risk agent NFT id

hf_doc_agent_id.description: Hedge fund document agent NFT id

hf_credit_agent_id.description: Hedge fund credit negotiator agent NFT id

hf_legal_agent_id.description: Hedge fund legal agent NFT id
